flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Henderson Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Henderson Community College fell 58% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.2k → $6.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Henderson Community College rose 31% between 2006 and 2009 (13.1% → 17.2%).
